## Associated Sources

- [Listener](#listener)

## Operations

### Ack

`<servicebus:ack>`

Allows the user to perform an ACK when the JmsAckMode#MANUAL mode is elected while consuming the
Message. As per JMS Spec, performing an ACK over a single Message automatically works as an ACK for
all the Messages produced in the same JmsSession.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Ack Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The AckId of the Message to ACK</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Queue Create

`<servicebus:queue-create>`

Creates a queue in the service bus instance

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Queue Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the queue</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Queue Description</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusQueueDescription">Service Bus Queue Description</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>An InternalQueueDescription object containing the desired values of the queueâs properties to create</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusQueue">Service Bus Queue</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Queue Delete

`<servicebus:queue-delete>`

Deletes the specified queue in the service bus instance

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Queue Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the queue</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Queue Get

`<servicebus:queue-get>`

This operation retrieves the specified queue from the Service Bus instance.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Queue Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the queue</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusQueue">Service Bus Queue</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Queue Send

`<servicebus:queue-send>`

This operation sends a message to a queue.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Destination Queue</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the queue.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Transactional Action</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ALWAYS_JOIN</p></li><li><p>JOIN_IF_POSSIBLE</p></li><li><p>NOT_SUPPORTED</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Type of transactional action.</p></td><td><p>NOT_SUPPORTED</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Send Correlation Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Correlation strategy id for operation.</p></td><td><p>AUTO</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The body of the Message</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>JMS Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The JMSType identifier header of the Message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Correlation ID</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The JMSCorrelationID header of the Message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Send Content Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether or not the body content type should be sent as a property</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The content type of the messageâs body</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Send Encoding</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether or not the body outboundEncoding should be sent as a Message property</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Encoding</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The encoding of the messageâs body</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reply To</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusJmsDestination">Service Bus JMS Destination</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The destination where a reply to this Message should be sent</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>User Properties</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>The custom user properties to set for this message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>JMSX Properties</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#JmsxProperties">JMSX Properties</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The JMSX properties to set for this message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Persistent Delivery</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If true, the Message is sent using the PERSISTENT JMSDeliveryMode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Priority</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The default JMSPriority value to use when sending the message.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Time To Live</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines the default time the message is in the broker before it expires and is discarded.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Time To Live Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit to use in the timeToLive configurations.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Disable Message Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If true, flags the message to avoid generating its MessageID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Disable Message Timestamp</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If true, flags the message to avoid generating its sent Timestamp.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delivery Delay</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Only used by JMS 2.0. Sets the delivery delay to apply to postpone the message delivery.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delivery Delay Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit to use in the deliveryDelay configurations.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Queue Update

`<servicebus:queue-update>`

This operation updates the specified queue in the Service Bus instance.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Queue Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the queue</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Queue Description</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusQueueDescription">Service Bus Queue Description</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>An InternalQueueDescription oject containing the desired values of the queueâs properties that will be updated</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusQueue">Service Bus Queue</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Queues

`<servicebus:queues>`

This operation retrieves all existing queues from the Service Bus instance.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#ServiceBusQueue">Service Bus Queue</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Recover Session

`<servicebus:recover-session>`

Allows the user to recover a session when the JmsAckMode#MANUAL mode is elected while consuming the
message. Per the JMS Spec, performing a session recover automatically redelivers all the consumed
messages that were not acknowledged before the recover.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Ack Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The AckId of the Message Session to recover</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Rule Create

`<servicebus:rule-create>`

This operation creates a rule for the specified topic and subscription.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Rule Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the rule to create</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Rule Description</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusRuleDescription">Service Bus Rule Description</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>An InternalRuleDescription object containing the desired values of the new ruleâs properties</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the topic that contains the subscription for which to create a rule</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the subscription that contains the new rule</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusRule">Service Bus Rule</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Rule Delete

`<servicebus:rule-delete>`

This operation deletes a rule from the specified topic and subscription.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the topic that contains the subscription from which to delete the rule</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the subscription from which to delete the rule</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Rule Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the rule to delete</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Rule Get

`<servicebus:rule-get>`

This operation retrieves a rule from the specified topic and subscription.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the topic that contains the subscription from which to retrieve the rule</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the subscription from which to retrieve the rule</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Rule Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the rule to retrieve</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusRule">Service Bus Rule</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Rule Update

`<servicebus:rule-update>`

This operation updates a rule from the specified topic and subscription.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Rule Description</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusRuleDescription">Service Bus Rule Description</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>An InternalRuleDescription object containing the desired values for the ruleâs updated properties</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic that contains the subscription for which to update the rule</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the subscription for which to update the rule</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Rule Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the rule to update</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusRule">Service Bus Rule</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Rules

`<servicebus:rules>`

Retrieves all rules from the specified topic and subscription

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic that contains the subscription from which to retrieve all rules</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the subscription from which to retrieve all rules</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#ServiceBusRule">Service Bus Rule</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Subscription Create

`<servicebus:subscription-create>`

Creates a subscription in the specified topic

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic to contain the new subscription</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the subscription to create</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Description</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusSubscriptionDescription">Service Bus Subscription Description</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>An InternalSubscriptionDescription object containing the desired values of the new subscriptionâs properties</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusSubscription">Service Bus Subscription</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Subscription Delete

`<servicebus:subscription-delete>`

Deletes a subscription from the specified topic

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic from which to delete the subscription</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the subscription to delete</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Subscription Get

`<servicebus:subscription-get>`

Retrieves a subscription from the specified topic

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic from which to retrieve the subscription</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the subscription to retrieve</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusSubscription">Service Bus Subscription</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Subscription Update

`<servicebus:subscription-update>`

Updates a subscription from the specified topic

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Description</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusSubscriptionDescription">Service Bus Subscription Description</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>An InternalSubscriptionDescription object containing the desired values of the subscriptionâs updated properties</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic from which to update the subscription</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Subscription Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the subscription to update</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusSubscription">Service Bus Subscription</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Subscriptions

`<servicebus:subscriptions>`

Retrieves all subscriptions from the specified topic

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic from which to retrieve all subscriptions</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#ServiceBusSubscription">Service Bus Subscription</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Topic Create

`<servicebus:topic-create>`

Creates a topic in the service bus instance

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Description</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ServiceBusTopicDescription">Service Bus Topic Description</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>An InternalTopicDescription object containing the desired values of the topicâs properties that will be created.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ServiceBusTopic">Service Bus Topic</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- SERVICEBUS:INVALID_TOKEN
- SERVICEBUS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTION_EXCEPTION
- SERVICEBUS:UNKNOWN
- SERVICEBUS:AMQP_ERROR
- SERVICEBUS:CONNECTIVITY
- SERVICEBUS:REST_ERROR

### Topic Delete

`<servicebus:topic-delete>`

Deletes the specified topic from the service bus instance

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

Retrieves the specified topic from the service bus instance

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Topic Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the topic</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>
